name: Shadow Escape
description: Soar into an endless vertical adventure in Shadow Escape! Equipped with a powerful jetpack, your mission is simple—fly higher, dodge obstacles, and survive as long as possible. With smooth controls, fast-paced action, and addictive gameplay, this game keeps you coming back for “just one more run.” Whether youre a beginner or a seasoned player, Shadow Escape delivers nonstop excitement as you push your limits and chase new heights.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
